name: Recall from Sahara
summary: Send a query to Sahara and display matching memory snippets without speaking sensitive content automatically.

steps.name: Load paired endpoint and token
steps.notes: Use a token paired with memory:recall scope.

steps.name: Ask for query
steps.notes: If launched from Siri, allow dictation of the query.

steps.name: POST recall JSON
steps.notes: POST to endpoint + /v1/recall with Authorization bearer token and JSON body.

steps.name: Display results
steps.notes: Display snippets and titles. Do not use Speak Text automatically because memory content may be sensitive.
